name: agent-native-design
description: Explore, compare, iterate, and export interactive UI design prototypes from the Design app.

interface.shortDescription: Explore, compare, iterate, and export interactive UI design prototypes from the Design app.
interface.longDescription: Design packages agent instructions, app actions, an MCP connector, and inline UI surfaces as an installable skill. The plugin connects to hosted Design by default; use the Agent-Native CLI when you need a custom/self-hosted app URL.
defaultPrompt: Search Design and return usable context
